caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is captured against a plain, dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic adorned with small floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small, black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her garment. In each frame, she is speaking and gesturing with both hands. Her right hand is slightly raised and open, while her left hand moves toward her chest. Her facial expression changes slightly as she speaks, with her mouth open and eyes occasionally narrowing. A small, circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The scene remains static in terms of location and composition, with only the woman's subtle movements and expressions evolving as the sequence progresses.
